mapper.select: select id, arrival_id, order_item_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, specification, unit, arrival_number, qualified_number, unqualified_number, abnormal_note, sort_number, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted from arrival_item where arrival_id = #{arrivalId} and deleted = 0 order by sort_number asc, id asc
